mustHaves.summary: Public GET /zip/{code} returns city/state/county/population JSON, no auth
Clear 404/400 + machine-readable error body for bad/unknown codes
Per-IP rate limit with documented limits + 429/Retry-After

notes: abuse-surface REQUIRED: the entire product is a public unauthenticated network surface; M3 (rate limit) + M2 (input validation) are exactly its evidence. authn/authz excluded: explicitly anonymous, no accounts. secrets EXCLUDED: no authn, no external integration, and the dataset is a static public-domain file loaded in-memory at boot (no DB credentials). The §6 budget line is a cost ceiling, not a secret-management constraint. secrets is excluded-by-default, so with no elevating signal it stays excluded (the derivation table only ever resolves the excluded-by-default five to required or excluded — never optional). perf-envelope excluded: §8 asserts correctness + rate-limit behavior but names no concrete latency/throughput number (contrast fixture 06). observability required: public production service. external-integrations decided 'none' (static dataset).
